use_cases: Displaying blog posts or articles in a visually appealing card-based layout
Showcasing company news, updates, or thought leadership content
Presenting tutorial or educational content in an organized grid format
ai_summary: A blog section component designed to display article previews in a card-based layout with images, titles, and excerpts. Typically features hover animations and responsive design for showcasing blog content across websites. Commonly used on landing pages, marketing sites, and content platforms to highlight written content.
